criteria.name: User Ratings and Reviews
criteria.description: Reflects user satisfaction and app quality based on ratings and reviews in app stores.

criteria.name: AI Personalization
criteria.description: The degree to which the app uses AI to tailor content, recommendations, or experiences to individual user needs and preferences.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert reviews

criteria.name: Functionality and Features
criteria.description: The breadth and depth of features offered by the app, including task management, health tracking, content generation, and integration with other services.

criteria.name: Number of Downloads/Active Users
criteria.description: Indicates the app's popularity and adoption rate.
criteria.sources: App store statistics, Sensor Tower, Similarweb

criteria.name: Expert Reviews and Mentions
criteria.description: Assessments and recommendations from tech blogs, industry experts, and publications.
